name: What evidence do I need for a chemical exposure sickness claim in Salt Lake?
description: Medicals tying to work, exposure docs, witnesses.[2]

mainEntity.name: What evidence do I need for a chemical exposure sickness claim in Salt Lake?

acceptedAnswer.text: Medicals tying to work, exposure docs, witnesses.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Medical reports linking illness to work, exposure records, coworker statements, job history.[2][3] Physician's First Report starts claim.[2] Key factors: Timeline of symptoms, no alternative causes, expert testimony. Collect safety data sheets, photos; attorney preserves evidence chain.
